_comment: Hand-labeled topology corpus for the Mnemoss dreaming validation. 30 memories across 3 topics (work / family / hobby). 12 queries: 4 single-hop (a single memory or one cluster answers), 4 multi-hop (requires Relations spreading-activation across 2+ memories), 4 negative (gold set empty). Designed so HDBSCAN's default min_cluster_size=3 should classify all 30 as cluster members with zero noise. Topic labels enable noise-aware ARI scoring of the Cluster phase.

memories.content: alice mentioned the Q3 platform roadmap at standup yesterday
bob is alice's coworker on the platform team
bob complained that the migration timeline is unrealistic
carol said the migration spec slipped to october
carol leads design for the analytics dashboard
the analytics dashboard launch is targeted for october fifteenth
alice approved the dashboard mockup in the friday review
platform team standup is every monday at ten
bob skipped the wednesday architecture review
the migration spec is a forty-page document
mom called this morning about thanksgiving plans
dad is fixing the leaky kitchen faucet
mom asked if i'm coming home for thanksgiving
my sister just got promoted at her law firm
my sister is moving to seattle in december
the family golden retriever had its annual checkup
my nephew started kindergarten last week
my niece won the district piano recital
thanksgiving dinner is at aunt linda's house this year
aunt linda is hosting all fourteen of us for the holiday
finished reading dune messiah over the weekend
ordered a new chisel set for woodworking projects
the workshop has good natural lighting now
built a small bookshelf from oak for the bedroom
the bookshelf needs another coat of clear varnish
joined a local hiking group through the meetup app
saturday's group hike is to mount tamalpais
mount tamalpais summit elevation is twenty five hundred feet
packed trail mix and water for the saturday hike
the mount tam loop trail is seven miles round trip

queries.query: when does the migration spec ship
what did alice's coworker say about the platform migration
how many people are at the dinner my aunt is hosting
how long is the trail my hiking group is doing on saturday
did dad fix any plumbing recently
what did the cat eat for breakfast
when is the rocket scheduled to launch
how was the chocolate chip cookie recipe
